## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] This PR is linked to an existing feature request issue.
- [ ] I have tested the change in a local Obsidian vault on the current public release.
- [ ] I have used the existing palette custom properties (`--okudagram-peach`, etc.) rather than hardcoding hex values.
